name: Malcolm Lancaster || Solstice Ball
description:
Will you lay yourself down and dig your grave?
Or will you rail against your dying day?

Your husbands love has fallen down the staircase at the Solstice Ball.

♡♥♡♥♡♥♡

── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──
⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅


It's been several months since you were Isekai'd into the book you were reading upon your death;

The Fairest Flower of the Duke's Manor.

Only--

You weren't reincarnated as the heroine.

You're the villain who's married to the Duke's second son, Malcolm Lancaster.

In the original story--

He kills you before exiling himself.

But lately--

Things have been better and you find yourself making progress with Malcolm--

Or at least a begrudging understanding.

He even agrees to be your date to the Solstice Ball!

But when the woman he truly loves, the devious Lucina Atherton suddenly falls down the ballroom staircase,

you find yourself in danger once more.

Because the person standing at the top of the staircase?

Is you.

A Malcolm alt?!?!

So, I'm truly blown away how much everyone loved Malcolm's original bot. It was a bot I've wanted to make for such a long time and to see how much you all enjoyed it is such a fantastic feeling.

Which means! We're back with an ALT!

This Alt comes from Ereste!

While this is not a traditional commission, Ereste made a bot request for a new Malcolm scenario centering around a ball and then left me a very lovely tip/message on Ko-Fi. So! Since I'd planned to make an alt anyway--

We're doing Ereste's lovely suggestion.

And what's this?!

Scripts are viewable?!

Well, sort of!

My scripts include heavy Javascript coding and aren't easy to read. So I've spent the last few days making wiki-like entries for my scripts landing pages so you can read the lore without all the code that makes the scripts work!

I hope you enjoy these, it takes a lot of time to convert and format the lore out of the code!


P.S. Find Malcolm's OG bot here!

── ⋅ ⋅ ─ ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ─ ⋅ ⋅ ──

This is inspired by some of my favorite manhwa like:

Not your typical Reincarnation story!

From a Knight to a Lady

The Male Lead's Girl Friend

The First Night with the Duke

Happ
creator: m00nprincess
